ci._perf_comment: [R29-B-FIX] Desktop perf threshold loosened from 0.90 → 0.85. The 0.90 floor was at the noise floor of the GitHub Actions runner (measured 0.84-0.95 across 5 R28 runs). 0.85 keeps the regression-detection signal (a real perf hit drops well below 0.85) without flaking on routine runner-CPU variance. Mobile threshold (0.75) unchanged — the R29-B index-chunk-86%-reduction gives the mobile run real headroom.
